description: Legal document written by Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100-1138 CE), per Weiss' paleographical assessment. A father disinherits his younger daughter Sitt al-Nās (and her husband) with a 1/4 dinar and gives all he has to his daughter Dalāl. This is presumably because Sitt al-Nās did not look after him in his time of need (line 2: I perished from nakedness and hunger and [illness, probably]). Information from Goitein's note card. Mentioned in Med Sod V, p. 123, n. 419.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בכתב יד חלפון ב. מנשה (פעיל 1100–1138 לספירה). אב מדיר בתו הצעירה סת אל-נאס (ובעלה) בשליש דינר ונותן את כל רכושו לבתו דלאל, כנראה בשל כך שסת אל-נאס לא טיפלה בו בשעת מצוקה
